description: Produces an ISO 22301 business continuity plan for a named organisation — business impact analysis, recovery objectives (RTO/RPO/MTPD), continuity strategies, and a plan with named recovery roles. Use this skill whenever a user asks to write a business continuity plan, BCP, BIA, disaster-recovery or resilience plan, or to set RTO/RPO recovery objectives. It runs a BIA to find time-critical activities and their dependencies, derives RTO/RPO within the MTPD (RTO < MTPD, never asserted alone), selects continuity strategies, and documents the plan with named owners, deputies, and review dates — emitted as a branded report. It complements (not duplicates) the emergency-response-plan: ERP handles the incident response; BCP handles continuity of critical activities. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: business-continuity-plan
